title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・届かねえ頂

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Who will take the lead?! Looks like there's a
fierce fight for the front as the racers sprint up
the hill!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (Damn it! I can't catch up!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek grabs the lead! She's pulling ahead!
Aaand she crosses the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
She mighta lost, but Inari was still great out there!
Definitely one of the better runners today!

text_block_list.name: Townswoman
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Sob... That was incredible!

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text: Oh no, Inariii! You were so close!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You really were so close...

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text:
You're amazing, Creek! There's no one better
than you! You were so cool out there!

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text: You'll win next time, Oguri! I know you will!

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
Looks like the leaders of this generation were a
wall too high to overcome... This won't help Inari
One's reputation of being inconsistent.

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
But we shouldn't count her out yet! She can still
turn things around! All she has to do is pull off a
decisive victory at her next race. You can do it,
Inari One! I believe in you!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Aaagh!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Dammit, dammit, damn it all!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(This race was like a slap in the face from reality!
That's how far I needa get if I wanna be
Umamusume of the Year!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Everyone, thank you so much for rooting for me!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Creek.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm running in the Arima Kinen. What about you?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ Of course I'll be there.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Then that's where I'll beat you. At the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I won't let you win so easily. I'm going to win
there just like I won today.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Sounds like it's going to be a good race.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (They're so confident! Neither of 'em have any doubts that they'll be the one to win and rise to the top!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (Rrgh! Damn it! I'm the one who's gotta win though! I've gotta! So why... Just why?!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (Why do I still believe they're better than me?)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (Why don't I feel like the real deal?)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Lemme run in the Arima Kinen. Please.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oguri and Creek're gonna be there. I gotta beat 'em there. I have to.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Just defeatin' one of 'em isn't enough. I gotta
prove I'm better than both of 'em!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I gotta do this. I needa win if I'm ever gonna reach
the top!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, we set the Arima Kinen as our next
goal, so Inari One can have a rematch against
Oguri Cap and Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day, while training...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Ack!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I-I'm fine, Boss! Lemme keep goin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I-I'm fine, Boss! Lemme keep goin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I can't afford to waste a single second! I gotta
keep trainin'—I'm not good enough!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I dive forward to catch Inari One just before she
collapses and lands face-first on the ground.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sorry... I musta slipped on someth—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You gotta be kiddin' me! I don't have time to rest!
The Arima Kinen's right around the corner!
choice_data_list:
If you keep this up, you won't be able to run in
it at all!

If you keep this up, you won't be able to run in
it at all!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: But whazza point of runnin' if I can't be the best?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Y'know what Oguri and Creek are doin' right
now? Trainin'! And gettin' miles 'n' miles ahead of
me!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
They're gonna be even stronger than they were at
the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
If I wanna claim a huge victory over 'em and take
the seat at the very top, then I gotta put my life
on the line and train like I mean it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Everyone's countin' on me... I...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I don't wanna... let 'em...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One loses all strength halfway through her
sentence. She falls again, and this time, she's so
exhausted she can't even speak.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I end up taking her to the infirmary, where she's
instructed to rest in her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
According to the doctor, physical exhaustion
played a part in her collapse, but the main cause
was her severe mental distress.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I'm such a joke...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I'm so mentally weak I couldn't
even finish up my trainin' without collapsing... I'm
pathetic...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Forget becomin' the best... I can't ever face
everyone back home again...
choice_data_list: You know none of that is true.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
choice_data_list: Look, just focus on resting now.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Damn it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen her so worn out before. Just
thinking about her defeated expression makes my
heart ache.
choice_data_list: I don't know what I'm supposed to do...
I don't know what I'm supposed to do...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It feels wrong to reassure her that she'll be able to
train again soon. All I want is to ease the burden
on her heart and cheer her up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want her to return to her normal fiery self... I'm
her partner—I should be able to do something.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wahoo! Wahoo!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's more like it! Keep those festival vibes
goin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: C'mon, that includes you too! Wahoo! Wahoo!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
This place is part of who I am. I'm only the stylin',
fearless Edo girl I am...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...'Cause of the people livin' here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I sift through the memories I shared with Inari
One, I manage to think of something that might
be able to help her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Except, if I try it now, what if it has the opposite
effect?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One's skills as a racer are the result of her
bond between her and the people of her
hometown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The only thing I can do is place my faith in that
bond!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, I muster up my determination and
reach out to Chief.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And together, we discuss what we'd like to do for
Inari One.
